title: Better Map Items
description: Changes the texture of the map and filled map to look more like what you actually hold in your hand.
body:
[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/JiW4MLF.png)](https://discord.gg/PJCXjSJnu2)

# Better Map Items

This resource pack changes the texture of the Empty and Filled Map, to be more like what you actually hold in your hand

![](https://i.imgur.com/itLtgWM.png)
